title: AI Raises the Bar on Vulnerability Awareness and Secure-by-Design Software
summary: AI-powered vulnerability scanning leaves no excuse for unpatched bugs as the EU Cyber Resilience Act pushes firms toward secure-by-design software

title: Agentic AI Accelerates Software Builds and Mobile App Attacks
summary: Digital.ai data reveals 87% of apps were attacked over the past year

title: Grafana Labs Confirms Hackers Stole Source Code
summary: Open source tool maker Grafana says hackers stole codebase via GitHub breach

title: Hackers Bypass Security Tools to Target Users Directly
summary: Bridewell report calls out emergence of “fix-style” attacks

title: Interpol Launches Sweeping Cybercrime Crackdown in MENA Region
summary: Over 200 people were arrested in an anti-cybercrime operation that spanned 13 countries across the Middle East and North Africa

title: The Infosecurity Europe Cyber Startup Competition: Meet the Finalists
summary: New for 2026, the Infosecurity Europe Startup competition will see five finalists pitch their ideas in front of a live audience, including senior industry leaders, investors and buyers

title: NCSC Publishes Guidance on Securing Agentic AI Use
summary: The UK’s National Cyber Security Centre is helping organizations to understand agentic AI security risks

title: Security Researchers Find 47 Zero-Days at Pwn2Own Berlin
summary: The research community was awarded $1.3m as it found dozens of novel vulnerabilities at Pwn2Own Berlin

title: Bank of England, FCA and Treasury Raise Alarm Over Frontier AI
summary: The UK’s financial authorities have set expectations for the sector on cybersecurity and operational resilience

title: Gremlin Stealer Evolves into Modular Threat with Advanced Evasion Capabilities
summary: A new Gremlin stealer variant has evolved into a modular toolkit with advanced evasion and data theft capabilities, according to new Unit 42 research

title: Microsoft Reports Severe Zero-Day Flaw in On-Prem Exchange Servers
summary: The zero-day vulnerability affects on-premises installations for all versions of Exchange Server 2016, 2019 and Subscription Edition

title: China-Linked Hackers Deploy New TencShell Malware Against Global Manufacturer
summary: A suspected China-linked threat actor targeted the Indian branch of a global manufacturer leveraging an open source offensive toolkit

title: Mustang Panda Linked to Updated FDMTP Backdoor in Asia-Pacific Espionage Campaign
summary: Mustang Panda campaign deploys updated FDMTP backdoor against Asia-Pacific and Japan networks

title: Google Launches Android Spyware Forensics Tool for High-Risk Users
summary: Google’s Android Advanced Protection Mode is getting a new feature allowing trusted security experts to investigate potential spyware infections

title: New Fragnesia Flaw Hands Linux Local Users Root Access
summary: New Fragnesia kernel flaw lets unprivileged local users escalate to root on Linux systems

title: Most Organizations Now Use AI Agents for Sensitive Security Tasks
summary: Semperis study finds 74% of organizations believe AI will increase attacks on identity infrastructure

title: ICO Publishes Five-Step Plan to Counter Emerging AI-Powered Attacks
summary: The Information Commissioner’s Office has released new guidance on how to mitigate the risk of AI-powered attacks

title: Canvas Owner Reaches Agreement With Cybercriminals After Ransomware Attack
summary: Instructure says it reached an agreement with ShinyHunters over the Canvas breach data

title: Avada Builder Flaws Expose One Million WordPress Sites
summary: Avada Builder flaws allowed file read and SQL injection on one million WordPress sites

title: Ransomware: Over Half of CISOs Would Consider Paying Ransom to Hackers
summary: Survey of cybersecurity leaders suggests that majority would strongly consider paying cybercriminals, if that’s what it took to help restore encrypted systems

title: Global Cyber Agencies Issue New SBOMs for AI Guidance to Tackle AI Supply Chain Risks
summary: The G7 Cybersecurity Working Group releases new SBOM for AI guidance, outlining seven key data clusters to boost transparency and security across AI supply chains

title: UK Cybersecurity Market Expands to £14.7bn with Strong Growth in AI Security Firms
summary: UK cybersecurity sector reaches £14.7bn in revenue, driven by rapid growth in AI security firms, increased investment and rising employment across the industry

title: Microsoft Fixes 17 Critical Flaws in May Patch Tuesday
summary: Microsoft has patched 120 vulnerabilities in this month’s security update round

title: OpenAI Launches 'Daybreak' to Help Build Secure By Design Software
summary: With Daybreak, OpenAI wants its frontier AI models to be used to deploy secure by design software from the ground up

title: Mini Shai-Hulud Hits TanStack npm Packages
summary: Mini Shai-Hulud compromises TanStack npm packages and spreads across PyPI

title: End‑to‑End Encrypted RCS Messaging Arrives Across iPhone and Android
summary: Apple begins rolling out end-to-end encrypted RCS messaging between iPhone and Android in iOS 26.5

title: Attackers Combine ClickFix With PySoxy Proxying to Maintain Persistence
summary: Exploitation of open-source tools allows attackers to maintain persistent access after initial social engineering, warn ReliaQuest researchers

title: Malicious Hugging Face Repository Typosquats OpenAI
summary: HiddenLayer reveals infostealer malware in a Hugging Face repository

title: South Staffordshire Water Fined £1m After Data Breach
summary: The ICO has fined South Staffordshire Water nearly £1m for a series of data protection failings

title: TrickMo Variant Routes Android Trojan Traffic Through TON
summary: ThreatFabric finds new TrickMo Android banking trojan variant routing C2 through The Open Network

title: Rushed Patches Follow Broken Embargo on New Linux Kernel Vulnerabilities
summary: Two new high-severity vulnerabilities, dubbed ’Dirty Frag’ when chained, have been found in the Linux kernel, affecting most Linux distributions

title: Fake Claude Code Page Pushes PowerShell Stealer at Devs
summary: Ontinue uncovers fake Claude Code installer pushing PowerShell stealer abusing Chrome's IElevator2

title: Hackers Observed Using AI to Develop Zero-Day for the First Time
summary: Google Threat Intelligence Group details how cybercriminals attempted to launch a campaign based around an AI-developed Zero-Day targeting open-source software

title: US: FCC Relaxes Foreign-Made Router Ban to Allow for Security Updates
summary: The same extension applies to security updates shipped to US-based users of foreign-made drones

title: ShinyHunters Escalates Canvas Extortion with School by School Ransom Campaign
summary: ShinyHunters has escalated its Canvas extortion campaign, defacing hundreds of school login pages and threatening to leak stolen data unless institutions negotiate

title: Zara Data Breach Impacts Nearly 200,000 Customers
summary: ShinyHunters gets away with emails and other data on 200,000 Zara customers

title: Police Shut Relaunched Crimenetwork Dark Web Marketplace
summary: Spanish police have arrested the suspected administrator of German dark web marketplace Crimenetwork

title: Australian Cyber Security Centre Issues Alert Over ClickFix Attacks
summary: ACSC warns over a campaign targeting organizations which uses ClickFix to deliver Vidar infostealer malware

title: PCPJack Campaign Boots TeamPCP Off Compromised Machines
summary: SentinelOne believes the PCPJack campaign may be the brainchild of a former TeamPCP member

title: Legacy Security Tools Failing Data Protection, Capital One Software Report Finds
summary: Traditional network security tools are undermining data protection, with Forrester and Capital One Software research warning AI adoption is impossible without rethinking data security

title: Cline Kanban Flaw Lets Websites Hijack AI Coding Agents
summary: Oasis Security finds critical Cline kanban WebSocket flaw exposing AI coding agents to hijack

title: OpenAI and Anthropic LLMs Used in Critical Infrastructure Cyber-Attack, Warns Dragos
summary: Commercial AI models were used to help plan and conduct cyber-attack against operational technology of a water and drainage facility, say researchers

title: Fake Claude AI Site Drops Beagle Backdoor on Windows Users
summary: Sophos finds fake Claude site spreading DonutLoader and a new Beagle backdoor via DLL sideloading

title: Daemon Tools Developer Confirms Software Was Trojanized
summary: A China-linked threat actor backdoored a version of Daemon Tools to infect thousands

title: Researchers Spot Uptick in Use of Vercel for Phishing Campaigns
summary: Cofense has warned of a “significant” increase in phishing campaigns abusing Vercel platform

title: CloudZ Malware Abuses Phone Link to Steal SMS OTPs
summary: Cisco Talos uncovers CloudZ RAT and Pheno plugin abusing Microsoft Phone Link to intercept SMS OTPs

title: CISA Urges Critical Infrastructure Providers to Make Plans to Remain Operational if hit by Cyber-Attack
summary: CISA’s CI Fortify initiative aim for critical infrastructure operators to build isolation & recovery

title: Iran-Linked APT Posed as Chaos Ransomware Member in Espionage Campaign
summary: Rapid7 reveals an Iranian false flag operation masquerading as a Chaos ransomware attack

title: One in Eight Workers Has Sold Their Corporate Logins
summary: Cifas says that 13% of employees admit selling company credentials to a former colleague

title: Microsoft Flags Mass Phishing Campaign Using Fake Compliance Emails
summary: Microsoft researchers warn of a large-scale phishing campaign using fake compliance emails to steal credentials, targeting 35,000 users across 13,000 organizations worldwide
